docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,100.00 FILED BY SMITH, ALCOMBRIA AS TO DEFENDANT YOAKUM, JOSEPH S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT DATE BE ADVANCED TO 7/12/02 10:00 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,090.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YOAKUM, JOSEPH S.

IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 8/9/02 AT 10AN, THE COURT WILL CON'T ACTION FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ALCOMBRIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOAKUM, JOSEPH S. $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
